steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: For a rectangle, area equals length times width. Multiply the given length, $42$ centimeters, by the given width, $38$ centimeters.

steps.title: Apply the rectangle area formula
steps.content:
For a rectangle, area equals length times width. With length = 42 cm and width = 38 cm:
$$A = 42 \times 38$$

steps.title: Calculate the product
steps.content: Multiply: $42 \times 38 = 1,596$ square centimeters. The units are square centimeters because the two side lengths are both measured in centimeters. D is correct.
